creator: freebsd@signout.dk
text:
Since it is no longer possible to fetch version 1384587 from the vendors homepage it would be nice to get the port updated. The following should do.

> cat distinfo
SHA256 (VMware-vSphere-Perl-SDK-5.5.0-2043780.i386.tar.gz) = 0717672728f8abc9066927127d48a3570fcf1d931a1a6e0bbfcfd2df7cb6629a
SIZE (VMware-vSphere-Perl-SDK-5.5.0-2043780.i386.tar.gz) = 27482536


> grep DISTREL= Makefile
DISTREL=                2043780
